title: rubus × corymbosiformis
intro: Rubus × corymbosiformis, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubus genus, a group of thorny shrubs with edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus × corymbosiformis include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × corymbosiformis include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus × corymbosiformis can be found in the form of jams, jellies, and teas, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
